case_title: GAR YUEN VS. DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY YUEN, GAR AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YUEN, GAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC. $3,445.46 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,540.46 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
